I sat down and plotted out the starting points for these tracks over the last few years, even teased some of them, and then had to leave them dormant to finish other projects with a smaller timeline. I've finally formed a plan to bring them all together.     <section id="about-tralbum" class="about-tralbum-container desktop-left">
        <h2 class="bc-visually-hidden">

                About this album

        </h2>
        <p class="expando-text not-truncatable" data-inited="true">
            The first in a 4-part series of albums reviving and

compiling unreleased 2 Mello tracks, "rhythm pools 01 - naissance" is a
wish for warmth, recuperation and regrowth in the new year.
<br>

<br>
These are special ideas formerly without a home that I really needed 
time to sit down and fully express. I sat down and plotted out the 
starting points for these tracks over the last few years, even teased 
some of them, and then had to leave them dormant to finish other 
projects with a smaller timeline. I've finally formed a plan to bring 
them all together. It has been so refreshing to return to these and make
 them my outlet for sound design, production ideas and unusual tangents 
in 2026.
<br>

<br>
I hope you enjoy this first release for the spring season. Thanks for your support!
            <!-- this span fixes the weird Safari line clamp bug -->
            <span>&nbsp;</span>
        </p>

        <span>read more...</span>
        <span>less</span>
    </button>

    </section>

                <div class="bio">
                    I like making the type of music I'd like there to be

more of in the world. Hope you find both excitement and calm here.

</div>
